title: Traditional Platforms vs Unchained Commerce for Selling Software Plugins Without PayPal
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great software plugin and being unable to collect payment is a frustrating experience many creators in restricted countries face, with platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip being unavailable due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements, leaving them without a clear way to sell their digital products and get paid, this is where alternative solutions come into play, offering a way out of this payment limbo and into a world where creators can focus on what they do best, creating valuable content for their audience
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing traditional platforms to Unchained Commerce, it's essential to understand that you're not just comparing features, but also the underlying infrastructure and compliance requirements that come with each, traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe have strict KYC requirements and geographic restrictions that can limit access for creators in certain countries, whereas Unchained Commerce operates on a crypto-native infrastructure that has no such restrictions, allowing for a more global and inclusive approach to digital commerce
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip often rely on payment processors like PayPal and Stripe, which can be problematic for creators in restricted countries, as these payment processors have strict compliance requirements and may not be available in all countries, this can lead to a breakdown in the payment process, resulting in lost sales and revenue for creators, Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, uses a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins and has no KYC requirements, making it a more viable option for creators in restricted countries
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, like the one used by Unchained Commerce, operates on a decentralized network, allowing for peer-to-peer transactions without the need for intermediaries like traditional payment processors, this approach eliminates the need for KYC requirements and geographic restrictions, making it possible for creators in restricted countries to sell their digital products and get paid without any hurdles, the use of crypto-native infrastructure also enables instant automated delivery, real-time analytics, and a more secure payment process
The biggest hurdle for creators in restricted countries is not the quality of their products, but rather the ability to collect payment and get paid
The Real Cost Difference

While traditional platforms may seem like a more affordable option at first, the costs can add up quickly, especially when considering the fees associated with payment processing and the potential losses due to restricted access, Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers a one-time payment option, with products like the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, providing a more cost-effective solution in the long run, with no subscriptions or recurring fees, creators can keep more of their hard-earned revenue
Which One to Use and Why

For creators in restricted countries, Unchained Commerce is the clear choice, offering a crypto-native infrastructure that is designed to work around traditional payment processing restrictions, with a range of products and tools available, including the Full Stack Bundle, creators can quickly and easily set up their own digital storefront, without the need for intermediaries or payment processors, and start selling their software plugins and other digital products to a global audience
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

For creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries, finding a reliable way to sell digital products without PayPal can be a challenge, but with Unchained Commerce, it's possible to set up a digital storefront and start selling software plugins and other digital products without the need for traditional payment processors, and as for the best PayPal alternative, Unchained Commerce offers a crypto-native infrastructure that is designed to work around traditional payment processing restrictions, making it a viable option for creators who want to sell online without a Stripe account or PayPal
Crypto payment infrastructure is the key to unlocking a more global and inclusive approach to digital commerce, allowing creators to sell their products to anyone, anywhere in the world
Related Topics Worth Reading

Creators in restricted countries often face similar challenges when trying to sell digital products online, whether it's due to PayPal restrictions in Nigeria or Gumroad limitations in other countries, the key is to find a platform that can provide a reliable and secure way to sell digital products and get paid, without the need for traditional payment processors or intermediaries
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your digital storefront, make sure you have a clear understanding of your target audience and the products you want to sell, then, set up your Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect to enable crypto-native payments, and don't forget to configure your Admin Dashboard to track your sales and analytics in real-time, with these tools in place, you'll be well on your way to selling your software plugins and other digital products to a global audience, and with the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have everything you need to succeed, including priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide

Success for creators in restricted countries means being able to focus on what they do best, creating valuable content for their audience, without the hassle and frustration of traditional payment processing
Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
